game_name: Shining Force: The Legacy of Great Intention

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement data documented for this tactical RPG

special_mechanics.name: Grid-based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Tactical RPG using square grid battlefield. Each unit moves a fixed number of squares determined by Move statistic. Max (protagonist) walks on exploration map outside of battles

tier_notes: Tier 1 (T1) qualitative data. Shining Force is a turn-based tactical RPG, not an action platformer. No real-time movement physics, gravity, or jump mechanics exist. Game features grid-based tactical combat and exploration modes. ROM: 2 MiB, SRAM: 8 KiB. Developers: Climax Entertainment, Sonic! Software Planning.
